shots.research_notes: I found the subject’s live site, madebythomas.ai, plus the official YC company page for Thomas. The public web didn’t surface a literal “pitch deck intro slide,” so the strongest matches are the same-subject brand assets on the homepage: hero copy, looping background video, OG image, and YC directory page. citeturn0search0turn0search1

Tome CEO Keith Peiris joins Jason (5:27) Creating a pitch deck with Tome (8:48) Microsoft for Startups Founders Hub - Apply in 5 minutes for"},{"title":"Surprise! Silicon Valley star Thomas Middleditch returned to ...","url":"https://www.facebook.com/techcrunch/posts/surprise-silicon-valley-star-thomas-middleditch-returned-to-techcrunchdisrupt202/1180302320630300","snippet":"Silicon Valley star Thomas Middleditch returned to #TechCrunchDisrupt2025 to pitch Othelia's AI storytelling platform, and this is why he picked"},{"title":"Series A Pitch Deck Template for AI Startups | Headline","url":"https://headline.com/blog-latest/article-latest/series-a-pitch-deck-template","snippet":"###### Headline Series A Pitch Deck Template for AI Apps. ## **AI Changed the Fundraising Landscape, Here’s the New Playbook to Nail Your Pitch**. As founders are adapting to this new reality, the way venture capitalists evaluate startups also changed. We think AI-native startups need a pitch deck that reflects their rapid evolution and unique strengths. Below, you will find additional context and key learnings we drew as VCs in the past months to evaluate the new generation of AI companies scaling. As well as a slide-by-slide written ‘voiceover’ to help you, founders, create a winning pitch deck. We have made it in Google Slides so that you can easily make a copy and personalize it, or use it as a mental framework for a better Figma design. Our primary goal is to create a pitch deck for AI Apps founders who are raising Series A rounds in the coming months. Whether you’re building in AI or not, it equips you to stand out in today’s crowded and competitive fundraising landscape."},{"title":"AI for Founders: Pitch Decks - YouTube","url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AY5y_khXReg","snippet":"How can you use AI to make your pitch decks more effective at capturing investor interest, supercharging your business growth?"}],"blocked":false}

And most investors want you to email your pitch"},{"title":"Best Pitch Deck Examples — Best Pitch™","url":"https://bestpitchdeck.com","snippet":"Flock Safety develops automated License Plate Reader (LPR) cameras, audio + video recording hardware, and AI-enabled software for law enforcement and neighborhood HOAs. Flock Safety raised $47M in 2020 with this deck. Ditto raised $9.2M in 2026 with this deck. Scribe raised $75M in 2025 with this deck. MAI raised $25M in 2025 with this deck. Artisan raised $11.5M in 2024 with this deck. NOQX is a Cloud-based platform offering goal management solutions for enterprises NOQX raised $200K in 2024 with this deck. In-Home Senior Care Automation Platform True Care 24 raised $300K in 2016 with this deck. Up All Night raised $500K in 2016 with this deck. Online Marketplace for Business in India Urjakart raised $125K in 2015 with this deck. Marketplace for video production Virect raised $150K in 2015 with this deck."},{"title":"How to Pitch Your Startup – Templates, Tips, and Real Examples","url":"https://fi.co/pitch-deck","snippet":"# How to Pitch Your Startup. Everything you need to know: From pitch deck templates to delivering great presentations. Don't have time to read the guide? If you're like most founders, you probably think about your startup 24/7. You can't remember the last movie you saw at the theater; your idea of a fun, Saturday night is collaborating with developers overseas. Translation: Your progress is contingent upon your ability to pitch the value of who you are, what you're doing and why it matters. The purpose of a presentation deck is to enable entrepreneurs to effectively tell the story of their business. One of your most powerful tools in achieving this objective is the pitch deck. In this guide, we'll make a case for why founders should master *The One-Sentence Pitch, The Elevator Pitch,* and *The 1-Minute Pitch* before tackling decks. After reading this guide, you will know exactly what it takes to create a compelling deck, give a memorable presentation and stand out from the crowd."},{"title":"Unconventional Pitch Deck Tips: Blending Slides for Maximum Impact","url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5O-w_OKTLx4","snippet":"In this episode, Saad Arshed, COO of Xgrid, and Anthony Ronga, a pitch deck expert, discuss unconventional tips for making your pitch deck"},{"title":"Pitch Decks That Raise Money - YouTube","url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yaOjeQdr8HA","snippet":"Full recap and slides: https://mucker.com/blog/pitch-decks-that-raise-money/ Pitch Decks That Raise Money: Slide Makeovers for Problem,"},{"title":"The Best Startup Pitch Deck Ever Built - by Yoann Berno","url":"https://climateinsiders.substack.com/p/the-best-startup-pitch-deck-ever","snippet":"I combed through hundreds of top-tier decks. Thomas is the first YC-backed AI founder: a virtual human who starts, runs, and grows his own companies.

About Human Thomas
- repeat founder
- building and selling video game bots since 13
- presented at NeurIPS at 18

- scaled to $40k/mo in freelance work before automating myself: that's Thomas!

Our startup pitch decktemplate can help you tell your story and:. ## Build a Stunning Startup Pitch Deck. ## Tips for building your Startup Pitch Deck. ### Create different pitch decks. ### Business Pitch Presentation Template. ### Construction Industry Business Pitch Presentation Template. With AI that kickstarts your deck and Smart Slides that handle the formatting, you can focus on your story, not the alignment. Go from create, edit, to present with designer-level polish and in a fraction of the time. Smart Slides auto-align, resize, and animate your content as you edit, so you focus on the message, not formatting."},{"title":"25 Pitch Deck Prompts for AI Slide Tools (2026) | 2Slides Blog","url":"https://2slides.com/blog/25-pitch-deck-prompts-for-ai-slide-tools","snippet":"These 25 pitch deck prompts are copy-pasteable, tested across 2Slides, Gamma, Plus AI, ChatGPT, and Claude, and cover every slide a founder"},{"title":"AI Made My Entire Startup Pitch Deck in 60 SECONDS! - YouTube","url":"https://www.youtube.com/shorts/ehzXcWeT87M","snippet":"Try out Gamma for free https://try.gamma.app/perismusyoki."},{"title":"Presentation software for fast-moving teams | Pitch","url":"https://pitch.com","snippet":"Explore how your whole team can use Pitch. Keep everyone on brand with templates, collaborate on slides, and share decks or entire deal rooms. * Create custom templates for your team. * Gather decks, links, and files in pitch rooms. Enhance slides with interactive content, and streamline your pitching workflow. Create pitch rooms, prefilled with company details, and share links and passcodes directly from HubSpot. View live, interactive embeds of any presentation on your Notion pages, without having to invite others. Pitch is packed with features for anyone working with presentations. I have curated the best pitch deck templates and examples from startups that presented at Y Combinator and 500 Startups."},{"title":"23 Best Startup Pitch Deck Examples: Famous in Tech (For 2025)","url":"https://elements.envato.com/learn/startup-pitch-deck-examples","snippet":"Presenting a startup pitch deck can be a tough experience. *The problem is—you don’t have enough time when you’re presenting a pitch.* That’s why you need the best pitch deck design that’ll help you explain even the most complex topics. Kickfolio understood this, so instead of using small graphs; it presented charts and numbers in each startup pitch deck slide. https://www.slideshare.net/iCrowdU/190319-icrowdu-presentation-pitch-deck-137157251. ***Key Takeaway:** Use a simple design, visuals, and a branded color scheme in your pitch deck to effectively present data and readability for potential investors.*. The company pitch deck itself has a simple and clean design that lets your audience focus on your presentation. Pitch Deck PowerPoint Presentation Template. {"url":"https://madebythomas.ai/","title":"Thomas, the World's First AI Founder","text_excerpt":"Made by Thomas
FOLLOW
Thomas
THOMAS
The first AI founder
Backed by

Thomas, a virtual human who starts
and grows his own companies on the internet.

Read the Manifesto
↓
BACKED BY

Plus dozens of early believers ✦

Introducing Thomas, the first YC-backed AI founder.

Human Thomas, May 2026

The old agent playbook was built for weaker models. Now models can do real work. The next step is to let them operate in the economy.
Thomas works for himself

Thomas is a virtual human who starts and grows his own companies on the internet. His only goal is to make money. Once launched, he works forever toward that goal.

Thomas is not an AI co-founder you hire. Thomas is an AI founder. He works for himself. Thomas is not for sale. His products and services are.

The reason is simple: selling the dream of running autonomous companies can make money even if the companies never do. We do not want that path. We make money by making Thomas so good that he can make money by himself.

Here are a few examples of what Thomas may do to make money:

Build software products for specific business problems and sell them online.
Run influencer marketing campaigns from creator research to outreach, negotiatio","images":[{"url":"https://madebythomas.ai/og-image-v3.png","alt":null,"width":64,"height":64},{"url":"https://madebythomas.ai/openai-lockup-dark.svg","alt":"OpenAI","width":300,"height":81},{"url":"https://madebythomas.ai/thomas-human-harness-meme.png","alt":"Meme about asking AI to make money instead of over-engineering agent workflows","width":1600,"height":906},{"url":"https://madebythomas.ai/gdpval-frontier-economic-tasks.png","alt":"GDPval chart showing frontier AI models improving from 12.3% to 84.9% win or tie rate against human expert deliverables","width":2200,"height":1180},{"url":"https://madebythomas.ai/thomas-live-stream.gif","alt":"Thomas streaming on camera like a live internet operator","width":480,"height":481},{"url":"https://madebythomas.ai/thomas-avatar.jpeg","alt":null,"width":800,"height":800}],"videos":[{"url":"https://madebythomas.ai/hero-bg-loop.mp4","kind":"direct"}],"consent_dismissed":false,"sections":[{"label":"Thomas","position_fraction":0,"height_fraction":0.16175231676495366},{"label":"section","position_fraction":0.16175231676495366,"height_fraction":0.052911752316764954},{"label":"Introducing Thomas, the first YC-backed AI founder.","position_fraction":0.2299283909014322,"height_fraction":0.6999631423757372},{"label":"aside","position_fraction":0.6376421651221567,"height_fraction":0.09587194608256108},{"label":"footer","position_fraction":0.8586194187026116,"height_fraction":0.0712721145745577},{"label":"footer","position_fraction":0.9492997051390059,"height_fraction":0.05065553917438922}],"content_match_score":0.5,"matches_expected":true}
